name: secmp
description: Android security testing proxy with ADB certificate injection and traffic capture

secmp.runtimePath.description: Optional local SecMP runtime directory. Point this to the extracted runtime directory, or to a parent directory containing runtime/. This takes precedence over archive and URL settings.

secmp.runtimeArchivePath.description: Optional local SecMP runtime zip path. The extension extracts this archive into global storage when the runtime is missing or invalid. This takes precedence over runtimeUrl.

secmp.runtimeUrl.description: Optional URL for the SecMP runtime zip. Leave empty to use the runtime from the matching GitHub Release.

secmp.runtimeSha256.description: Optional SHA-256 checksum for the SecMP runtime zip. Leave empty to use the built-in checksum for the default GitHub Release runtime when available.

secmp.runtimeVersion.description: Expected SecMP runtime version. Changing this value forces the extension to install that runtime version.

secmp.windowsRuntimePath.description: Deprecated compatibility setting. Use secmp.runtimePath instead.

secmp.windowsRuntimeArchivePath.description: Deprecated compatibility setting. Use secmp.runtimeArchivePath instead.

secmp.windowsRuntimeUrl.description: Deprecated compatibility setting. Use secmp.runtimeUrl instead.

secmp.windowsRuntimeSha256.description: Deprecated compatibility setting. Use secmp.runtimeSha256 instead.

secmp.windowsRuntimeVersion.description: Deprecated compatibility setting. Use secmp.runtimeVersion instead.

secmp.updateCheckEnabled.description: Automatically check the SecMP GitHub Release for a newer VSIX package.

secmp.updateCheckIntervalHours.description: Minimum interval, in hours, between automatic SecMP update checks.
